zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Lauder於1290年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可時，他的父親Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth26歲。他和Elizabeth Wilbore至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1337年9月在英國蘇格蘭莫雷埃爾金享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lauder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

variants.name: Lawter
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lawder
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lowther
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lauderdale
meanings: English: habitational name from the valley of Lauderdale, named from Lauder + either Old Norse dalr or Old English dæl ‘valley’.

variants.name: Lowder
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Lauder was born in 1290, in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass, was 27 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth, was 26. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Wilbore. He died in September 1337, in Elgin, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Lauder est né en 1290, à North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Wilbore. Il est décédé en septembre 1337, à Elgin, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert De Lauder 1290 in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass 27 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth 26. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Wilbore mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im September 1337 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Elgin, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Lauder è nato il nel 1290 nel North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Wilbore. Morì nel settembre 1337, nel Elgin, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Lauderが1290年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアノース バーウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bassは27歳，母Lady Elizabethは26歳であった。彼はElizabeth Wilboreとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1337年9月にイギリススコットランドモーアイエルジンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Lauder(이)가 1290년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 노르스 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Wilbore(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 9월 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 엘긴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Lauder nasceu em 1290, em North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Wilbore. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1337, em Elgin, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Lauder родился в 1290 г. в местности норт бирвикк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth, 26. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Wilbore. Он умер сентябрь 1337 г. в местности элгин, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert De Lauder nació en 1290, en North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert de Lawedre of the Bass, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Wilbore. Murió en septiembre de 1337, en Elgin, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
